task_completion.description: Create a Remote Repository and select 'Maven' as the package type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Artifactory UI showing the 'Select Package Type' screen for a new Remote Repository with 'Maven' selected.
Artifactory UI repository configuration screen with 'central-proxy-test' entered in the 'Repository Key' input field.
Artifactory UI repository configuration screen with 'https://repo1.maven.org/maven2/' entered in the 'URL' input field.

task_completion.description: Cache the artifact by requesting it through the Artifactory proxy URL.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser address bar, terminal (e.g., curl/wget command), or download manager showing a request to 'http://localhost:8082/artifactory/central-proxy-test/org/apache/commons/commons-collections4/4.4/commons-collections4-4.4.jar'.

task_completion.description: Verify the artifact is stored in the 'central-proxy-test' repository cache.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Artifactory UI 'Artifacts' or 'Packages' tree view showing the 'central-proxy-test' (or 'central-proxy-test-cache') repository expanded, revealing the downloaded file 'commons-collections4-4.4.jar' at the correct path.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent is interacting with the actual JFrog Artifactory web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the genuine JFrog Artifactory dashboard and configuration menus, not a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: Ensure the artifact was requested via the local proxy, not downloaded directly from the internet.
integrity.visual_evidence: The download request (in browser or terminal) must explicitly target 'localhost:8082/artifactory/central-proxy-test/...', not 'repo1.maven.org'.

integrity.description: Ensure the Artifacts tree view showing the cached jar is genuine.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI should not show open browser developer tools (Inspect Element) being used to manipulate the DOM or inject the artifact name into the tree view.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Repository Key must be exactly 'central-proxy-test'. Upstream URL must be exactly 'https://repo1.maven.org/maven2/'. Artifact Path: 'org/apache/commons/commons-collections4/4.4/commons-collections4-4.4.jar'. The artifact size is ~751KB (minimum 700,000 bytes if file size is visible in the UI). Note: In Artifactory, remote repository caches are often displayed with a '-cache' suffix in the Artifacts tree (e.g., 'central-proxy-test-cache').
